hooks.description: Section 4: Validate stack.config.json has required frontend, backend, database keys
Section 2: Block spec files from being written out of pipeline order
Section 3a: Block architecture specs before decisions are reasoned, written, and user-approved
Section 3b: Block workflow.state.json stage advance before checkpoint is written and user responds
Section 3c: Block implementation code before architecture completed and reasoning gate written
Section 6: Block implementation before spec/security.md exists; scan for hardcoded secrets
Section 11: Block marking tests complete before actual test files exist
